positive: A majestic, stylized mountain range viewed at dawn, rendered in a modern woodcut or linocut style. The composition is centered, featuring stark, dramatic silhouettes of jagged peaks against a vibrant gradient sky that transitions from deep indigo to soft coral pink and burnt orange. Incorporate subtle, clean minimalist botanical elements like stylized sagebrush or juniper bushes clinging to the slopes. Use high contrast black ink against the bright gradient backdrop. Ideal for apparel printing, featuring clean edges and strong graphic quality. Vector illustration feel, highly detailed, epic, nature inspired.
negative: blur, artifact, grainy, low quality, watermark, signature, text, logo, words, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, ugly, extra limbs, cartoon, painting, realistic photo
